name: Signal Function Set
_comment: Build script will modify slug/name/version for dev builds to allow coexistence
author: Stuart Frederich-Smith

modules.name: Drift
modules.description: Phase shifted LFO with offset, attenuation and stability controls

modules.name: GSX
modules.description: Granular synthesis module based on Barry Truax's GSX system (1985-86), with real-time control over temporal, spectral, and spatial parameters

modules.name: Fugue
modules.description: 8-step harmonic deviation sequencer with three independent CV/gate voices

modules.name: Phase
modules.description: Dual sample looper with phase drift via sleep and rotate modes, transient detection, and waveform display

modules.name: Overtone
modules.description: Additive synthesis VCO with 8 individually-toggled harmonics, even/odd filter, binary mask CV, and waveform display

modules.name: Intone
modules.description: CHANT/FOF formant synthesis voice with vowel morphing, 5 formant cells, and dual excitation modes

modules.name: Tine
modules.description: Tunable 3rd-order pingable resonator based on the Gamelan Resonator circuit, with variable damping and VCA anti-click mode

modules.name: Fugue X
modules.description: Expander for Fugue — per-voice steps, range, sleep, probability, S&H mode, sorted CV outputs, and per-step trigger outputs

modules.name: MetaFugue
modules.description: Fugue and Fugue X merged onto one wider panel: three CV/gate voices with per-voice steps/range/sleep/probability, S&H mode, sorted min/mid/max CV outs, and per-step triggers. Ideal for hosts without expander support, like MetaModule.

modules.name: Meter
modules.description: Time-signature-aware musical clock with bar/quarter/eighth/sixteenth/triplet outputs, CV-controllable time signature, and external clock sync

modules.name: Meter X
modules.description: Expander for Meter. Adds a 24 PPQN clock, a Run gate, and Bar / 2 / 4 / 8 / 16 / 32 / 64 / 128-bar trigger outputs, each with an activity LED. Place directly to the right of a Meter.

modules.name: Beat
modules.description: Single-voice pattern sequencer with 8 patterns x 16 steps, on-screen step/velocity/accent editing, per-pattern length, and active-pattern progression

modules.name: Note
modules.description: Monophonic CV/gate pattern sequencer with 12-note pitch matrix, scale and root selection (incl. just-intonation harmonic series), 8 patterns x 8 steps with velocity/accent/probability editing

modules.name: Swell
modules.description: Ping-driven additive A/D envelope generator. Each ping adds voltage with its own rise, and pings stack additively over a continuous linear or exponential decay. Soft-saturated 0-10V output.

modules.name: Shift
modules.description: 4-output CV shift register. Per-lane step count, clock divider, step CV, and parallel/cascade mode (parallel = N-step delay; cascade = FIFO fed by the previous lane). Per-lane CV + gate outs, plus a random jumble pair.

modules.name: Wave
modules.description: Parametric wavetable voice. Six macro controls (Peaks, Bias, Transition, Skew, Width, Fold) sculpt the waveform; eight bookmark slots form a wavetable that WT INDEX scans with adjustable morph time.

modules.name: Vac
modules.description: Semi-stable A/R envelope with vactrol-like drift. A bipolar STAB control on rise and fall re-randomises the timing each trigger, so it wanders without collapsing. Linear↔exponential curve, latching loop, and an END trigger.

modules.name: Muse
modules.description: Faithful Triadex Muse port. Four Theme and four Interval sliders tap 40 sources (counters plus a 31-bit shift register) to spin out long, evolving melodic sequences. External clock, V/oct + gate out, randomize, and selectable scale.

modules.name: Gravity
modules.description: Gravity-driven chaos engine with six visual modes (double pendulum, gravity well, billiards, Pac-Man maze, LOGO turtle, spirograph/rose). All share bipolar X/Y, radius and angle CVs, six sector-distance CVs, and six boundary-ray gates. Drag the display to throw or aim.

modules.name: Band
modules.description: Harmonic bandpass bank. Four bands each lock to an integer harmonic of a shared 1V/oct fundamental, isolating harmonics of a rich wave. Per-band level and enable, a global harmonic-shift CV, plus mix and per-band outputs.

modules.name: Cycle
modules.description: Bar-synced quad LFO. Four channels, each with a morphable shape and depth, lock to a musical bar via clock + bar inputs (free-running in Hz when unpatched). Global phase spread and stability, per-channel uni/bipolar outs, full CV.

modules.name: Operator
modules.description: DX7-style 6-operator FM voice. Loads Yamaha DX7 .syx cartridges (or your own banks exported from Dexed), selects a voice, and plays it polyphonically. Built on the msfa FM engine.

modules.name: OP ENV
modules.description: Standalone DX7 operator envelope. Loads a voice's carrier EG from a DX7 .syx bank, offsets its eight rate/level attributes via trimpot or CV, and fires it from a gate to a 0-10V output.

modules.name: Chance
modules.description: Generative melodic-walk sequencer with 8 seeded patterns. A deterministic core melody plus a per-step branch probability of straying to a neighbour (Markov-weighted), with rest/hold/leap/ratchet shaping and an optional harmony voice. External clock; CV/gate out.

modules.name: Record
modules.description: Multisample auto-sampler. Drives an external voice with V/oct, gate, and velocity and captures its stereo output across a chosen note range and velocity layers, then writes a folder of WAVs plus an .sfz manifest.

modules.name: Play
modules.description: Polyphonic multisample player. Loads SFZ instruments (including those written by Record) and plays them polyphonically via V/oct, gate, and velocity, with CV instrument selection and stereo output.

modules.name: Ratio
modules.description: Quad ratio VCA. One signal and one CV feed four outputs, each scaling the CV by its own bipolar ratio with per-output slew and mute. CV is normalled to +10V, so the ratios act as a quad attenuverter when no CV is patched.

modules.name: Arrange
modules.description: Song-form arrangement sequencer: a linear chain of 8 phrases (bar-length sections), each with its own bar length, root, scale, and BPM. Four per-instrument clock buses (with division and CLOCK/BAR/RESET/EOC outs) drop instruments in and out per phrase. Master BPM/root/scale CV outs drive Meter and Note.

modules.name: Fill
modules.description: Auto-playing 5-channel drum sequencer. Curated groove banks organised into intensity tiers; one internal pressure value builds each bar and vents as a generated fill, so the groove thickens then releases — musical variation, not random. Per-channel gate/velocity/accent out.
